title: lumnitzera × rosea
intro: Lumnitzera × rosea, also known as the Pink Baeckia or Pink Mangrove, is a hybrid plant species in the family Combretaceae, resulting from the natural crossing of Lumnitzera arborea and Lumnitzera racemosa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lumnitzera × rosea include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in water to extract its medicinal compounds, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
